context.symptom: Runtime crash: missing native binding better_sqlite3.node

objective: Identify the root cause of the missing native module binding and apply the smallest reversible fix that restores deployment stability.
rules: Focus on native module compilation, Node ABI compatibility, and pnpm build behavior.
Propose only one preferred fix and one fallback.
All fixes must be reversible with a single commit revert.
analysis_steps: Confirm binding error indicates missing compiled native module.
Check Node version and ABI compatibility.
Verify pnpm install stage compiles native dependencies.
Verify compiled binary exists in node_modules.
Determine if runtime environment differs from build environment.

preferred_fix.strategy: Ensure native module compilation during build stage
preferred_fix.render_build_command: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm run build

fallback_fix.strategy: Pin Node version to match better-sqlite3 prebuilt binary ABI

verification: Confirm runtime starts without binding errors
